title: Telangana Government Extends School Holidays Due to Heatwave, Schools to Reopen on June 15 - Munsif News 24x7
full_text:
Hyderabad: The Telangana government has extended summer holidays for schools across the state due to continuing hot weather conditions. As per the latest decision, schools that were scheduled to reopen earlier will now resume classes from June 15. The decision was taken to safeguard students from the prevailing high temperatures being experienced in several parts of Telangana.
Table of Contents
Telangana Government Extends School Holidays Over Rising Temperatures
The Telangana government announced the extension of school holidays after reviewing the ongoing hot weather conditions across the state.
Officials said the decision was taken keeping in mind the health and safety of students, as several regions of Telangana continue to experience high temperatures. Authorities felt that extending the holidays would help students avoid exposure to the intense summer heat.
Schools to Reopen on June 15 Across Telangana
According to the latest decision, schools that were expected to reopen earlier will now begin classes from June 15.
Regular classes are expected to commence from June 15 in:
across Telangana.
Students and Parents Welcome Holiday Extension
The extension of summer holidays has been welcomed by students and parents.
Many families believe the additional break will help children stay safe during the ongoing hot weather conditions. The decision provides students with a few more days of vacation before the start of the new academic session.
Schools Asked to Make Arrangements Before Reopening
Schools have also been advised to make the necessary arrangements before reopening for the new academic year.
The government expects institutions to complete preparations during the extended holiday period so that classes can begin smoothly on June 15.
The Telangana government has extended school holidays across the state due to continuing hot weather conditions and concerns over student safety. Under the latest decision, schools will now reopen on June 15, giving students additional time away from the intense summer heat. Regular classes are expected to begin on June 15 in government, aided, and private schools throughout Telangana.
